title: trolling comand
description:
Fake Player Events (Join/Leave/Kill/Kick)
A fun utility mod for Fabric 1.20.1 that allows server administrators (or players with permissions) to send fake system messages to the chat. Perfect for pranks, roleplay, or testing chat layouts!
body:
Fake Player Events
A simple utility mod for Fabric 1.20.1 that lets you send fake chat messages. Perfect for pranks, roleplay, or testing!

🌟 Features:
100% Manual: Messages only appear when you type the command.

Multi-language: Supports both English and Russian messages.

Custom Deaths: Create any death reason you want.

⌨️ Commands:
/playerjoinen / /playerjoinru — Fake join message.

/playerleaveen / /playerleaveru — Fake leave message.

/playerkicken / /playerkickru — Fake kick message.

/playerkill <name> <reason> — Custom death message (any language).

🛠 Requirements:
Fabric API is required!
